title: Verify existing implementation of password strength validator
description: The `validatePasswordStrength(password: string): { valid: boolean; issues: string[] }` function already exists in `src/auth/password-validator.ts` with all required validations (8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number). All 14 tests in `src/auth/password-validator.test.ts` pass.
existing_patterns: src/auth/password-validator.ts — PasswordStrengthResult interface and validatePasswordStrength function following the existing auth module patterns
src/utils/*.test.ts — co-located test file convention for utility modules
